features: Delicious Flavor Duo: Enjoy a tantalizing duo with our Fun Time Cherry & Strawberry flavored lubes, perfect for adding excitement and sweetness to your intimate moments.
Silky-Smooth Texture: Experience a velvety, non-sticky glide that enhances comfort and pleasure during intimate encounters.
Body-Safe & Edible: Made with food-grade, non-toxic ingredients, these lubes are safe for oral use and suitable for sensitive skin.
Water-Based Formula: Easy to clean and compatible with latex condoms, silicone toys, and other accessories, ensuring safety and versatility.
Long-Lasting Moisture: Provides extended lubrication for uninterrupted play, reducing the need for frequent reapplication.
Perfect for Couples: Ideal for spicing up foreplay, oral play, and more with two enticing, sweet flavors in one convenient pack.
Discreet Packaging: Ships in discreet packaging to ensure privacy and a worry-free shopping experience.
description: Product description Elevate your intimate moments with Fun Time's Cherry & Strawberry Flavored Lube 2-Pack. Indulge in the irresistible sweetness of cherry and strawberry while enjoying a silky-smooth, non-sticky texture that enhances your pleasure. This premium water-based formula is sugar-free, easy to clean, and compatible with all toys and latex condoms. Designed for long-lasting use, Fun Time Lubes are pH-balanced, gentle on the skin, and crafted in the USA to the highest safety standards. Perfect for couples looking to spice up their love life with tantalizing flavors. Enjoy the best of both worlds with two full-size 75ML bottles for endless fun! Directions 1. Apply a small amount of lube to your hands and rub them together to warm it up. 2. Gently apply the lube to the desired area, avoiding sensitive skin and mucous membranes. 3. For oral use, apply a small amount to the mouth or genitals. 4. Reapply as needed for extended play. 5. Clean up with warm water and soap after use. Safety Warning RM See more
